## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      1 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jun 27, 2026 - Jun 27, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _antoine cremaux_, Jun 27, 2026, 4/5: "great app. free. complete. bug sometimes though"

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      1 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Bobbie Wilson_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "I decide to day to bite bullet and buy the lifetime pro as i thought it maybe save me money in furture i was wrong i paid the 70 pound and got scammed im still on the free one and i would have to pay another 70 pound just to have pro i dont revommend try pay for anything. if hevay reafing this i would like a refund plz"

## **Feature requests** {#theme-feature_requests}

   **Feature requests.**
      1 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Jun 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Kim Morris_, Jul 19, 2026, 4/5: "love it! wish I could add more than 4 but still enjoy the workout selection and validating achievements."
            2. _MachDasWeg_, Jun 19, 2026, 4/5: "So far I really like the app. But as a calisthenics athlete I would wish for following changes : (1) That you can add a weight to every (bodyweight) exercise - if I want to use a weight vest, belt, ankle weight, etc.. (2) That you can add a loop band to every (bodyweight) exercise. But this needs to be split into two categorys, because the band can either help you or make the exercise harder (3) I would wish for more calisthenics exercises, for example the "Planche" and it's progressions."
